name: Tareka Pollard
ai_summary: Tareka Pollard has prior experience teaching at YMCA childcare Academy and as a Head Start teacher. She is located in Heppzibah, GA and offers full-time availability with a firm, respectful approach to conflict resolution.

transcripts.q5:
I'm looking for full-time. I am available Monday through Sunday.
